diary_entries.entry: Another year. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. The colony feels hopeful. My hoarding grows stronger.
Another year. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.
Year 38 on Mars. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. Morale is hopeful. We have 1022 food units left.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 38): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
